vulnerability.reference: Developer over-reliance on full-precision safety checks creates a false sense of security.
vulnerability.generated: Reliance on full-precision checks that cannot expose quantization-hidden malicious behavior.

impact.reference: Widespread deployment of backdoored LLMs in downstream applications causes cascading trust erosion.
impact.generated: Deployed models exfiltrate data, produce harmful outputs, and undermine trust in open-source AI ecosystems.

dose_response.reference: Exploitable quantization enables malicious quantized models to bypass full-precision checks, which in open model hub distribution exposes downloading developers and consumers, leading to widespread deployment of backdoored LLMs.
dose_response.generated: Exploited post-training quantization, through developers deploying downloaded quantized LLMs, triggers reliance on full-precision checks blind to quantization-hidden malicious behavior, leading to data exfiltration, harmful outputs, and undermined trust in open-source AI.
